name: com.apple.ironwood.support
title: Parental Control: Dictation and Profanity
description: The payload that configures parental control for dictation and profanity.

payloadkeys.content: If `false`, suppresses profanity. Use `forceAssistantProfanityFilter` in Restrictions instead.
If `false`, disables dictation. Use `allowDictation` in Restrictions instead.
